name: Junction
description: A clean grid of crossing rules studded with a node at each junction, re-weighting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( margin: -0.5px; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { border-top: @pick(5px, 9px) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-left: @pick(5px, 9px) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); } @random(0.3) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; @size: 18%; margin: -9%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
